推荐场景: 车站服务台｜综合票、站台、时间、延误
60秒任务: 「交通 Boss」：交通时间/站台/上车确认；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 交通信息｜时间地点｜票务初步｜延误｜上下车指令
场景族: 街道｜地铁站｜公交站｜出租车｜机场/车站
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I need to get to ___ by ___.（目标+时间）
Which is faster, bus or train?（比较交通）
Let’s check the route first.（先查路线）
The app says there is a delay.（转述 App）
We can take Line ___ and change at ___.（换乘方案）
If the train is late, let’s take a taxi.（备选方案）
The bus leaves in ___ minutes.（倒计时）
Do we need a ticket or a card?（票/卡选择）
Where is platform ___?（找站台）
Get on here and get off at ___.（上下车）
Let’s meet at the main gate.（集合点）
I missed the first bus, but there is another one.（问题+补救）
Can you repeat the station name?（请求重复）
We should leave now because it may be busy.（原因）
Please tell me when we arrive.（请求提醒）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: route, bus, train, taxi, platform, ticket, card, gate, app, station, delay
Verbs: take, change, leave, arrive, miss, check, repeat, pay
Adjectives: faster, slower, late, busy, crowded
Time / Place: by six, in ten minutes, main gate, next stop, airport, hotel
Chunks: check the route, change trains, take a taxi, platform number, traffic delay
